name: CineTreak STREAM 1S Video Switcher
description: Professional broadcast and content creators can enhance their productions with intuitive multicamera switching using the STREAM 1S Video Switcher from CineTreak.

features.Key Features:: All-in-One Live Streaming Switcher | 4 SDI Inputs | Controls up to 4 PTZ Cameras via VISCA. | Wireless IP Control | Record H.264 Files with Instant Playback | Downstreaming Support | Dual RTMP Streaming | Landscape & Portrait Mode | Luma & Chroma-Keying | PiP/PoP Video Support
features.What’s in the box?: CineTreak STREAM 1S Video Switcher | 12V, 2A Power Adapter | USB-A Cable (USB 3.0) | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
